codeReview.summary: Argon2id password hashing properly implemented with correct memory cost (64 MiB), time cost (3 iterations), and parallelism (4). hash() and verify() functions provided with proper error handling. Timing-safe comparison used in verification.

summary: auth-password-hashing implementation follows best practices. Argon2id parameters are appropriate for security. Never stores plaintext passwords. verify() uses timing-safe comparison.
